sequence.action: Capture scenario-first RED against current production before any source change, then implement closure-private current-document memory, remove serialized credential APIs, clear every required lifecycle boundary, reject non-closed identifiers without mutation, and preserve the just-in-time dirty-tree baseline.
Execute the reconciled targeted, broader, E2E, stress, load, Feature 004, collision, regression-quality, and implementation-reality checks and record current-session evidence.

Consume implementation and test evidence only after both delivery owners return; the reconciled certification inventory remains in_progress with zero completed scopes, and no routing run certifies completion.

constraints.effect: SCOPE-01 must execute its exact regression scenarios against current production and retain observed failing proof before implementation changes.
Credential state may exist only in closure-private memory for the currently loaded document and may not cross a document boundary.
The envelope, storage adapters, raw getters, bulk maps, header exporters, and transferable credential representations must be removed without a replacement serialization API.
Reload, route or history transition, bfcache traversal, page navigation, pagehide, close or reopen, new realm, and explicit clear must leave the affected document unconfigured.
Unknown, empty, inherited, constructor, and prototype-shaped identifiers must fail closed without runtime, registry, storage-surface, or prototype mutation.
Canonical scanner semantics gate SCOPE-05 closure but do not authorize downstream framework edits or block SCOPE-01 pickup.
The open collision and exact protected hash ab27e89cd0dd8c6dd640254615a10d15a2be008596ec72834ca4512766c646fc must remain unchanged; ambiguous shared-file edits stop.
Implementation must capture just-in-time status, index OID, worktree hash, and distinct hunk hashes, preserve unrelated dirty work, and stop on ambiguous ownership.

notes: BUG-001 active spec, design, plan, scenario, machine test-plan, user-validation, and certification inventory surfaces now agree on five sequential current-loaded-document memory-only and erase-only scopes, all not_started. This bug-owner reconciliation changed only bug.md active status/routing prose and state.json execution/routing metadata; product code, tests, report evidence, framework-managed files, certification fields, top-level status, and completion checkboxes remain unchanged. Current production still contains the bug. SCOPE-01 may dispatch to bubbles.implement under scenario-first RED, closure-private current-document memory, no serialized credential APIs, lifecycle clearing, closed identifiers, the dirty-tree baseline, DEP-BUG013 semantics, and F004-COLLISION-001 preservation.
